overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a survivor walking through an abandoned NERO checkpoint in a post-apocalyptic forest setting. The character carries weapons on their back while navigating past concrete barriers, abandoned vehicles, and temporary military structures before continuing down a winding forest road.

scene_state.functional_zone: abandoned NERO checkpoint with concrete barriers

events.description: character turns left to navigate around concrete barriers and abandoned vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the abandoned checkpoint, surveying the area while carrying a crossbow and bat on his back

entered.detail: abandoned white pickup truck with supplies visible in the bed
white mobile trailer with NERO markings and equipment
white and grey concrete Jersey barriers blocking the road
black canopy tent with white NERO lettering
rusted red sedan with broken windows
dark tunnel opening in the rock face at the end of the road

segments.scene_description: The character begins at an abandoned checkpoint, walking past a white pickup truck and NERO trailer on the right. Concrete barriers and a black NERO tent line the left side of the road. The character navigates around obstacles while a dark tunnel entrance looms in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: police checkpoint booth with barrier arm

events.description: passing the police car and approaching the checkpoint booth with raised barrier arm
exiting the checkpoint area and entering the open forest road

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the checkpoint gate, moving from the enclosed barrier area onto the forest road

entered.detail: abandoned police sedan with flashing light bar and POLICE markings
small grey metal guard booth with windows
red and white striped gate arm in raised position
tan sandbags piled near the checkpoint booth
damaged blue sedan parked on the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The character passes an abandoned police car and walks through a checkpoint gate with a raised barrier arm and guard booth. Sandbags line the right side near the booth. As the character exits the checkpoint, the scene opens into a forest road with a blue abandoned car visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest road with abandoned vehicles

events.description: character walks past the blue abandoned car on the right side of the road
road curves left and enters denser forest with larger trees and rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing down the forest road, passing abandoned vehicles while heading toward the mountains

entered.detail: abandoned red pickup truck off the side of the road
green directional highway sign with white text
moss-covered boulders and rock outcroppings among the trees

segments.scene_description: The character walks past the blue abandoned car as the road curves through denser forest. A red pickup truck sits abandoned on the right shoulder near a green road sign. Large moss-covered rock formations appear among the tall pine trees as the environment becomes more rugged.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest canopy road with winding path

events.description: character passes the speed limit sign and blue pickup truck on the right

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the forest, navigating the winding road surrounded by tall evergreen trees

entered.detail: white rectangular sign with black text showing speed limit 65
abandoned blue pickup truck parked on the forest roadside

segments.scene_description: The road winds deeper into the dense forest with the canopy blocking most of the sky. The character passes a speed limit 65 sign and an abandoned blue pickup truck on the right. Tall evergreen trees line both sides of the narrow road creating an enclosed, tunnel-like atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a structured military checkpoint into the claustrophobic depths of a dense evergreen forest. It begins by navigating past a white pickup truck, a NERO trailer, and concrete barriers, moving toward a dark tunnel entrance in the distance. As the character passes an abandoned police car and a guard booth with a raised barrier arm, the scene opens from the checkpoint into a winding road marked by a blue abandoned car. The environment then shifts toward a more rugged terrain, curving past a red pickup truck and green road signs as large moss-covered rock formations emerge among the pines. Finally, the road winds deeper into the woods, passing a speed limit sign and another blue truck while the overhead canopy closes in to create an enclosed, tunnel-like atmosphere.
